Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set No.1 , Request For Production Of Documents, Set 1; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Leroy W. Rice, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Gibran C. Farrah

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Robert Smiley's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
